ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale occurred */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the invoice */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sale has been returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., VN, JP) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region manager */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_region_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure (e.g., units, kg) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "channel_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel manager */,
  "channel_website" TEXT /* URL of the channel's website */,
  "channel_status" TEXT /* Status of the channel (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channels_channel_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the customer is located */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* Customer segment (e.g., high-value, low-value) */,
  "lifetime_value" REAL /* Lifetime value of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, call, meeting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  "interaction_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was resolved */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, marketing, finance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES sales_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales trend record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the trend data */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total quantity of sales */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated */,
  "trend_status" TEXT /* Status of the trend data (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id")
)
